title: Sanji and Zeff’s Starvation Flashback
description: On pages 1–4, Sanji’s past with Zeff is revealed through their starvation on a rock, explaining the debt that binds him to the Baratie.
scene: The flashback strips away the noise of battle and focuses on hunger, sacrifice, and the dream of creating a restaurant where no one is denied food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's the situation we're stuck in.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So let's just try and get along until help comes, alright?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: that damn geezer... like I'd let him know if I see a ship.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He can go to hell for all I care.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm gonna survive alone.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I can see so far away across the ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm sure I'll be able to spot at least 1 or 2 ships if I wait 4-5 days.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: besides, I don't see any wreckage of the passenger ship I was on,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So it's possible that they might come and rescue me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now let's see.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have 5 days worth of food.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But thinking of the worst case scenario, it'd be best to split it evenly over 20 days.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll get to eat less per day,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But there's plenty of rainwater trapped in the crevices that I can drink. So I should be able to get by somehow.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If I can wait out 20 days, I'm sure a ship will pass by here.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I can definitely survive.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's simple!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Caw

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: GULP!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Glug plug glue!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: PWAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Maybe I'll eat just a little more...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: G... GULP!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Glug Glug Glugel

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No! I haven't even made it past the 1st day yet! It has to last 20 days no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Damn it! Stop rumbling, stomach!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uwehhh...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ughh...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nothing passed by today.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Maybe in 2 or 3 days...

summary: This part gives emotional meaning to Sanji’s choices: Zeff’s sacrifice explains why feeding the hungry is sacred to him.
